prerequisites: A Criteo account with access to the Criteo Partners Portal (https://partners.criteo.com) and permission to create apps in the My apps section.
An OAuth app created in the Partners Portal with the Client Credentials authentication method and the C-Growth (Marketing Solutions) service selected.
A downloaded client_id and client_secret key pair (saved at creation, since the secret is not retrievable from the portal later).
Domain authorizations and advertiser consent granted to the app for the accounts whose data you intend to sync.
Values for the required config fields: currency (reporting currency) and start_date; optionally end_date.

authMethods.name: OAuth2 Client Credentials (client_id + client_secret)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the secret fields client_id and client_secret using the OAuth2 client_credentials grant. It POSTs these to the Criteo token endpoint https://api.criteo.com/oauth2/token with grant_type=client_credentials and Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded, receiving a short-lived Bearer access_token (valid 900 seconds) that is sent as an Authorization: Bearer header on subsequent API calls.

setupSteps.title: Create an app in the Criteo Partners Portal
setupSteps.body: Log in to the Criteo Partners Portal and open the My apps section. Click the plus button to create a new app, then provide an application name and description.

setupSteps.title: Select Client Credentials and the C-Growth service
setupSteps.body: When configuring the app, choose Client Credentials as the authentication method and select the C-Growth (Marketing Solutions) service. Select the domain authorizations corresponding to the access your integration requires.

setupSteps.title: Generate and save your API key
setupSteps.body: Click Create new key. The portal downloads a text file containing your client_id and client_secret. Store these immediately, as the secret cannot be retrieved from the portal afterward.

setupSteps.title: Grant advertiser access
setupSteps.body: Generate a consent URL from the app and share it with the relevant account manager to authorize the app for each advertiser account whose data you want to sync. Consent URLs are single-use and can be regenerated.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the client_id and client_secret as the connector credentials. Set currency to your reporting currency and start_date to the earliest date to sync. Optionally set end_date to bound the sync window; leave it empty to sync up to the present.

sources.title: Criteo Marketing Solutions API - Client Credentials Setup
